title: Phase 3 — Distributed-safe Concurrency
description: Lease IDs (ULIDs), claim/release/heartbeat/done with --lease-id, reap, next with capability matching, idempotency via --operation-id, per-item Locker, full concurrency test suite.
deliverable: Multiple agents on the same machine can safely share a backlog. v0.3 shippable.
